categories.label: Apps & Products
categories.description: User-facing apps, hosted products, and commercial references that help builders understand complete sports AI workflows.

categories.label: Open-Source Projects
categories.description: Runnable repositories and prototypes that implement a sports AI workflow end to end.

categories.label: Datasets/APIs/Feeds
categories.description: Public data, sports APIs, live feeds, and reference datasets for building sports AI products.

categories.label: Developer Libraries/SDKs
categories.description: Packages, SDKs, and infrastructure libraries that help developers parse, normalize, visualize, and process sports data.

categories.label: AI Models/Components
categories.description: Reusable AI components for computer vision, modeling, LLM/NLP, media, and training-load workflows.

categories.label: Research Benchmarks
categories.description: Papers, benchmark datasets, simulation environments, and reproducible research references.

categories.label: Event Toolkits
categories.description: Event-specific builder kits, live data contracts, generated visuals, and matchday workflows.

categories.label: Learning Collections
categories.description: Awesome lists, handbooks, tutorials, and curated reference collections for sports AI builders.

tools.title: Sports AI Hub
tools.description: Provides the public web app companion for this directory, including builder navigation, prototypes, and project paths.

tools.title: Stonk Striker
tools.description: Turns stock and crypto price charts into a browser football striking game with market-shaped terrain.

tools.title: fantasy-manager
tools.description: Provides an open-source self-hosted fantasy manager.

tools.title: SportsEngine Tourney
tools.description: Manages tournament scheduling, brackets, standings, score updates, registration, and team communication.

tools.title: Second Spectrum
tools.description: Provides optical tracking, tactical analytics, and augmented broadcast tools for professional leagues and teams.

tools.title: llm-match-commentator
tools.description: Generates localized match commentary from structured event streams.

tools.title: wnba-gravity-mapper
tools.description: Calculates player gravity from basketball tracking coordinates and renders a heatmap.

tools.title: pickleball-court-mapper
tools.description: Detects pickleball court lines and generates annotated court diagrams.

tools.title: football-match-intelligence
tools.description: Builds football match intelligence dashboards with pitch control, sprint efficiency, and tactical sequencing.

tools.title: soccer-video-analytics
tools.description: Demonstrates automatic soccer ball possession analysis from video.

tools.title: Video Tagging Events
tools.description: Tags specific segments of a video for sports review and analysis.

tools.title: AthleteLoadMonitor
tools.description: Monitors and predicts athlete load for team-sport coaches.

tools.title: Coroebus
tools.description: Tracks training load, fitness, fatigue, and readiness for athletes.

tools.title: bracket
tools.description: Provides a self-hosted tournament system for creating and managing brackets.

tools.title: Competition Factory
tools.description: Manipulates tournament and league documents, including draws and competition structures.

tools.title: Ready2Race
tools.description: Plans and executes competition events such as coastal rowing races.

tools.title: fantasy-football-wrapped
tools.description: Generates fantasy league insights and charts for Sleeper and ESPN leagues.

tools.title: football_scout_rag
tools.description: Generates repeatable football player scouting reports with retrieval-augmented workflows.

tools.title: HYROX Gym Finder
tools.description: Finds nearby HYROXCN certified gyms from coordinates, region keywords, browser location, or imported JSON exports.

tools.title: balldontlie
tools.description: Provides API access to basketball teams, players, games, and box-score data.

tools.title: CollegeFootballData
tools.description: Provides college football API endpoints for games, drives, plays, rankings, ratings, and recruiting data.

tools.title: football.json
tools.description: Provides public-domain football match data in JSON for schedules, leagues, clubs, and results.

tools.title: StatsBomb Open Data
tools.description: Provides free soccer event data for public analysis and modeling.

tools.title: Metrica Sports Sample Data
tools.description: Provides sample soccer tracking and event data for analytics tutorials and reproducible analysis.

tools.title: dynastyprocess/data
tools.description: Provides open fantasy football data maintained by DynastyProcess.

tools.title: Challonge API
tools.description: Lets developers create tournaments, update brackets, and report scores programmatically.

tools.title: Toornament API
tools.description: Provides APIs for building tournament, match, calendar, ranking, and registration workflows.

tools.title: nba_api
tools.description: Provides a Python client for NBA.com stats endpoints and basketball data workflows.

tools.title: FastF1
tools.description: Loads Formula 1 timing, telemetry, session, schedule, and weather data in Python.

tools.title: Kloppy
tools.description: Standardizes soccer tracking and event data into vendor-independent Python objects.

tools.title: statsbombpy
tools.description: Streams StatsBomb soccer data into Python for analysis and modeling.

tools.title: mplsoccer
tools.description: Draws soccer pitches and common football analytics plots with Matplotlib.

tools.title: socceraction
tools.description: Converts soccer event streams to SPADL and values actions with VAEP or xT.

tools.title: soccerplots
tools.description: Creates radar and pizza charts for football player analysis.

tools.title: sportypy
tools.description: Draws regulation playing surfaces for several sports in Python.

tools.title: ffmpeg-python
tools.description: Provides Python bindings for FFmpeg video processing and filtering.

tools.title: floodlight
tools.description: Provides Python data structures, parsers, and analysis models for team-sport event and tracking data.

tools.title: OpenCV
tools.description: Provides open-source computer vision infrastructure for tracking, detection, and video analysis.

tools.title: sportsdataverse-py
tools.description: Provides a Python package for loading and tidying data from several SportsDataverse ecosystems.

tools.title: databallpy
tools.description: Reads, preprocesses, visualizes, and synchronizes soccer event and tracking data.

tools.title: yahoo-fantasy-sports-api-go
tools.description: Provides Go bindings for Yahoo Fantasy Sports APIs.

tools.title: Roboflow Sports
tools.description: Provides computer-vision examples, models, and workflows for sports detection, tracking, and analytics.

tools.title: soccer_xg
tools.description: Trains and analyzes expected-goals models for soccer.

tools.title: MMPose
tools.description: Provides an open-source pose estimation toolbox for biomechanics and movement analysis.

tools.title: OpenPose
tools.description: Detects real-time multi-person body, hand, face, and foot keypoints.

tools.title: OpenAI Whisper
tools.description: Transcribes commentary, interviews, and review audio for sports media workflows.

tools.title: Acute_Chronic_Workload_Ratio
tools.description: Calculates acute-to-chronic workload ratios in Python.

tools.title: sports-betting
tools.description: Collects sports betting AI tools and prediction experiments.

tools.title: Model Card Toolkit
tools.description: Documents training data, assumptions, limitations, and evaluation results for machine learning models.

tools.title: Google Research Football
tools.description: Provides a reinforcement-learning football environment for AI research.

tools.title: SoccerNet
tools.description: Provides datasets and benchmarks for soccer video understanding, action spotting, tracking, and game-state reconstruction.

tools.title: SportsMOT
tools.description: Provides a multi-object tracking dataset across basketball, football, and volleyball scenes.

tools.title: TacticAI
tools.description: Describes a football tactics assistant for predicting and generating corner-kick tactical recommendations.

tools.title: World Cup 2026 zone plan
tools.description: Defines the knockout-stage data contract, Match Center handoff, toolkit lanes, and operations checklist.

tools.title: World Cup 2026 assistant toolkit
tools.description: Classifies tools for Round of 32-to-Final workflows: data normalization, bracket scenarios, reports, xG, video, scouting, and localization.

tools.title: World Cup 2026 knockout-stage tool map
tools.description: Maps single tools to practical knockout use cases, including bracket state, match briefs, shot-quality context, video review, and multilingual media.

tools.title: analytics-handbook
tools.description: Introduces practical soccer analytics concepts and workflows.

tools.title: awesome-football-analytics
tools.description: Curates football analytics resources, datasets, software, and learning material.

tools.title: awesome-soccer-analytics
tools.description: Collects soccer analytics resources in English and Spanish.

tools.title: awesome-sports-analytics
tools.description: Collects sports analytics datasets, tools, papers, and learning resources.

tools.title: football_analytics
tools.description: Curates football analytics projects, data, and public resources.

recipes.title: Build Your Own xG Model
recipes.goal: Train and document a basic expected-goals model from public soccer event data.

recipes.title: Build Your Own Coaching Video Tagger
recipes.goal: Create a simple sports video tagging and coach-note workflow from user-owned footage.

recipes.title: Build Your Own Player Scouting Board
recipes.goal: Combine player profiles, public data, similarity charts, clips, and reports into a lightweight scouting board.

recipes.title: Build Your Own Athlete Load Dashboard
recipes.goal: Parse athlete-owned workload files, calculate load ratios, flag risk, and render a training dashboard.

recipes.title: Build Your Own Match Intelligence Report
recipes.goal: Normalize fixture and event data into an automated match report with model outputs and stat cards.

recipes.title: Build Your Own Sports AI Prototype Launch Pack
recipes.goal: Start from runnable prototypes and event kits when you want a compact demo that can be forked, explained, and shared.
